info.name: GoMobility — Passenger App API
info.description: Complete accurate API collection for GoMobility Passenger Application. Base URL: https://api.gomobility.co.in/api/v1

request.description: phone: 10-digit Indian (6-9XXXXXXXXX). fullName optional. email optional. role REQUIRED = 'passenger'.
OTP 6 digits. role REQUIRED. Returns accessToken + refreshToken.
type: home | work | other. label min 2, max 50. address min 5, max 500.
Replace 1 with actual address ID. All fields optional.
phone: 10-digit Indian. relationship optional. name min 2 max 100.
vehicleType: bike | auto | car

body.raw:
{
  "vehicleType": "bike",
  "pickupLatitude": 28.7041,
  "pickupLongitude": 77.1025,
  "pickupAddress": "Connaught Place, New Delhi",
  "pickupLocationName": "CP Metro Gate 1",
  "dropoffLatitude": 28.5355,
  "dropoffLongitude": 77.3910,
  "dropoffAddress": "Sector 45, Gurugram, Haryana",
  "dropoffLocationName": "Sector 45 Market",
  "paymentMethod": "wallet",
  "couponCode": "SAVE50"
}

/* vehicleType: bike | auto | car
   paymentMethod: cash | card | wallet | upi (optional, default: cash)
   couponCode: optional
   pickupLocationName: optional
   dropoffLocationName: optional */

request.description: ⚠️ Flat fields — pickup/dropoff ke liye nested object mat dena. vehicleType, pickupLatitude, pickupLongitude, pickupAddress, dropoffLatitude, dropoffLongitude, dropoffAddress REQUIRED.

response.name: 201 Success
200 Success

request.description: Replace 123 with actual rideId (integer)
reason_code REQUIRED. reason_text optional. driver_distance_meters optional (default 0).
⚠️ Field 'review' hai, 'comment' nahi. rating: 1-5 integer. review optional, max 500 chars.

body.raw:
{
  "pickup_latitude": 28.7041,
  "pickup_longitude": 77.1025,
  "pickup_address": "Connaught Place, New Delhi",
  "pickup_location_name": "CP Metro Gate 1",
  "dropoff_latitude": 28.5355,
  "dropoff_longitude": 77.3910,
  "dropoff_address": "Sector 45, Gurugram, Haryana",
  "dropoff_location_name": "Sector 45 Market",
  "vehicle_type": "bike",
  "payment_method": "cash",
  "pickup_time": "2025-04-15T09:30:00Z",
  "estimated_fare": 250.50
}

/* pickup_time: ISO8601 datetime (REQUIRED)
   vehicle_type: bike | auto | car
   payment_method: cash | card | wallet | upi (default: cash)
   pickup_location_name, dropoff_location_name, estimated_fare: optional */

request.description: ⚠️ snake_case fields. pickup_time (ISO datetime) REQUIRED. NOT 'scheduledAt'.
Replace 10 with actual scheduled ride ID

body.raw:
{
  "amount": 250.50,
  "purpose": "ride_payment",
  "payment_method": "upi",
  "ride_id": 123,
  "payment_gateway": "razorpay",
  "description": "Payment for ride #123"
}

/* purpose (REQUIRED): ride_payment | wallet_recharge | subscription | cancellation_fee | tip
   payment_method (REQUIRED): cash | card | wallet | upi
   ride_id: required when purpose = ride_payment | cancellation_fee | tip
   payment_gateway: razorpay | stripe (optional)
*/

request.description: cash/wallet: auto confirmed. UPI/card: returns gateway_order_id for Razorpay SDK.
⚠️ gateway_order_id, gateway_payment_id, gateway_signature — ye fields hain, orderId/paymentId/signature nahi.
type=upi: upiId + gatewayToken required.
type=card: cardLast4, cardBrand, cardExpMonth, cardExpYear, gatewayToken required.
⚠️ payment_method 'wallet' allowed nahi. Only cash | card | upi.
⚠️ ride_amount (number) required, rideId nahi. vehicle_type optional.

body.raw:
{
  "ride_id": 123,
  "reviewee_id": 1,
  "reviewer_type": "passenger",
  "reviewee_type": "driver",
  "rating": 5,
  "comment": "Excellent ride, very smooth",
  "tags": ["clean_car", "safe_driving", "polite_driver"],
  "tip_amount": 20
}

/* Driver tags:
   clean_car | safe_driving | polite_driver | on_time_pickup | good_navigation | ac_working | smooth_ride
   tip_amount: optional, max ₹500 */

request.description: ride_id, reviewee_id (driver's userId), reviewer_type, reviewee_type, rating — sab REQUIRED.
Replace 50 with actual reviewId. No body required.
⚠️ Flat fields — ride_id, latitude, longitude directly. Nested location object mat dena.
Replace alert_123 with actual alertId. No body.
plan_id aur payment_method REQUIRED.
subscription_id REQUIRED. reason optional.
subscription_id aur auto_renew (boolean) dono REQUIRED.
selfie aur aadhaar_photo: base64 encoded image strings.
category, subject (min 5), description (min 10) REQUIRED. ride_id optional.
message REQUIRED (min 1, max 2000). attachments optional (array of S3 URLs, max 5).

response.name: 200 Success

request.description: code: min 4, max 20 chars. REQUIRED.
